# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent envoy authz filter missing.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: "config.istio.io/v1alpha2"
kind: "EnvoyFilter"
metadata:
  name: "envoy_filter"
spec:
  workloadSelector: {} # select all pods in the same namespace as envoy filter is running on, if any service or deployment matches this selector then it will be considered for traffic routing. If not specified default to '*' which means match everything (i.e., every Pod) that has an Istio sidecar proxy
  config: |- # yaml syntax here indicates a block of text enclosed in dashes, and is used as the body or content inside this configuration file for EnvoyFilter resource definition  
    name: envoy_filter    
    filterChainMatchCriteria: {}     
    routeConfig {      
        virtualHosts : [{         
            name: "example.com",          
             routes : 
               - match: "/"              # define the path to be matched by this router, if not specified default is '/' which means all requests are routed here  
                 routeAction: ALLOW     # set action for matching request (ALLOW or DENY)   
         }]     
        retries : {}      
            timeout: 1s
